<?php /** * KeyUsage * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2016 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\File\ASN1\Maps; use phpseclib3\File\ASN1; /** * KeyUsage * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ abstract class KeyUsage { const MAP = [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_BIT_STRING, 'mapping' => [ 'digitalSignature', 'nonRepudiation', 'keyEncipherment', 'dataEncipherment', 'keyAgreement', 'keyCertSign', 'cRLSign', 'encipherOnly', 'decipherOnly' ] ]; }
